locations.name: 南蘇丹
locations.summary: 南蘇丹共和國（英語：Republic of South Sudan），通稱南蘇丹（英語：South Sudan），是非洲東北部一個內陸國家，2011年從蘇丹獨立。東面是埃塞俄比亞，南面是剛果民主共和國、肯亞和烏干達，西面是中非共和國，北面…

locations.name: 肯尼亚

relations.subject: Somali courser
relations.evidence: The Somali courser (Cursorius somalensis) is a wader in the pratincole and courser family Glareolidae, native to eastern Africa in Eritrea, eastern Ethiopia, Somalia, extreme southeast South Sudan, and northern and eastern Kenya
